caption.description: Select if you want to generate image captions instead of asking questions
caption.title: Caption

context.description: Optional - previous questions and answers to be used as context for answering current question
context.title: Context

image.description: Input image to query or caption
image.title: Image

question.default: What is this a picture of?
question.description: Question to ask about this image. Leave blank for captioning
question.title: Question

temperature.description: Temperature for use with nucleus sampling
temperature.title: Temperature

use_nucleus_sampling.description: Toggles the model using nucleus sampling to generate responses
use_nucleus_sampling.title: Use Nucleus Sampling
